title: Snow-flier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the snow-flier used on [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]|the [[snow flyer]] used on [[Akuria II]], or other uses of the word "[[Snow (disambiguation)|snow]]"}}
The '''snow-flier''' was a type of modified [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] developed by the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] which was adapted for use in the cold of the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]].

They appeared as floating vertical disk which possessed four spindly legs which were used for landing operations. They were equipped with [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons which were used for both military and police duties.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
